g.text: — Stage 1 trait, impls, and lifecycle types
(Rust class diagram; «trait» = trait, «struct» = struct, ..|> = `impl Trait for Struct`)

+tail_transcript(&self, app: AppHandle<R>, sid: String, cwd: Option<PathBuf>, path: PathBuf) : Result<TranscriptHandle, String>
but exit-collapse works in the UI).
`session_id: sid.clone()` so its Drop cascade works.
